parameters.name: text
parameters.value:
🟢 *Welcome to VIRAL ENGINE!* 💀🔥

I'm your autonomous IG growth machine. Here's what I can do:

📌 /niche [your niche] — Set your niche
🎨 /brand — Upload brand identity
🔍 /research — Deep niche research
✍️ /create — Generate carousel
📤 /post — Post to Instagram
📊 /analytics — View performance
📋 /report — Weekly intelligence report
💰 /monetize — Monetization strategies
📡 /status — System status
❓ /help — Show all commands

Or just chat with me normally! Tell me your niche to get started 🚀

parameters.name: text
parameters.value:
🟢 *Research Complete!* 📚🔥

I've completed deep research on your niche! Here's what I found:

📊 *Queries completed:* {{ $json.queriesCompleted }}
🧠 *Knowledge base built:* ✅

I now understand:
✅ Top competitors & their strategies
✅ Audience psychology & pain points
✅ Viral hook patterns
✅ Best posting times
✅ Hashtag strategy
✅ Trending topics

Ready to create content! Use /create to generate your first carousel 🎨

parameters.name: text
parameters.value:
🟢 *Posted Successfully!* 🚀🔥

Your carousel is now live on Instagram!

📊 I'll track performance and update you in 24 hours.

Commands:

✍️ /create — Make another

parameters.name: text
parameters.value:
🟢 *VIRAL ENGINE Help* 📚

*Commands:*
/start — Welcome message
/niche [name] — Set your niche
/brand — Upload brand identity
/research — Deep niche research
/create — Generate carousel
/post — Post to Instagram
/analytics — View performance
/report — Weekly report
/monetize — Monetization tips
/status — System status
/help — This message

*Or just chat with me!* 🗣️
Ask me anything about your niche, content strategy, or Instagram growth!

*Examples:*
• "What hooks work best in fitness?"
• "Create a carousel about morning routines"
• "How is my engagement looking?"
• "When should I start monetizing?"
